design_brief.goal: Generate qualified leads for lawn care services by showcasing expertise, building trust, and making it easy for homeowners to request quotes
design_brief.audience: Homeowners and small business owners who value professional lawn maintenance but lack time or expertise to do it themselves

visual_direction.layout: Clean, service-focused layout with clear visual hierarchy and prominent calls-to-action
visual_direction.typography: Professional sans-serif with strong headings for credibility and easy scanning
visual_direction.color_usage: Natural greens as primary with earth tones as accents, white space for cleanliness
visual_direction.motion: Subtle transitions that feel polished without being distracting

content_priorities: Clear service offerings with pricing signals
open_questions: Does the company focus on residential, commercial, or both markets?

tech_recommendations.reason: Straightforward site — static HTML + Tailwind is the fastest path to launch
Already configured — free tier, CDN, instant deploys
Contact forms on static sites need a form backend service
